name: fvm
description: Flutter Version Management: A cli to manage Flutter SDK versions

name: -c
--cache-path
options.description: Set the path which FVM will cache the version. Priority over FVM_HOME

args.name: path
args.description: Path to the Flutter versions cache

name: -s
--skip-setup
--no-skip-setup
options.description: Skip setup after a version install

name: -g
--git-cache
--no-git-cache
options.description: ADVANCED: Will cache a local version of Flutter repo for faster version install

subcommands.name: doctor
subcommands.description: Shows information about environment, and project configuration

subcommands.name: global
subcommands.description: Sets Flutter SDK version as global

args.name: version
args.description: Flutter SDK to set for global flutter command

subcommands.name: releases
subcommands.description: View all Flutter SDK releases available for install

args.name: version
args.description: The installed Flutter version to remove

subcommands.name: spawn
subcommands.description: Spawn a Flutter SDK version command

args.name: version
args.description: The Flutter version from which to spawn a command

subcommands.name: use
subcommands.description: Sets a Flutter SDK version to be used in a project

args.name: version
args.description: The Flutter SDK version to use

name: -f
--force
options.description: Skips command guards that does Flutter project checks

name: -p
--pin
options.description: If version provided is a channel. Will pin the latest release of the channel

options.name: --flavor
options.description: Sets version for a project flavor
